## What changed?

<!-- Briefly describe what you added or modified -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New event
- [ ] New project
- [ ] Member update
- [ ] Page content edit
- [ ] Site feature / bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Content is in the correct folder (`content/events/`, `content/projects/`, etc.)
- [ ] Images are optimized (< 500KB) and in `static/images/`
- [ ] Front matter fields are filled in (title, description, etc.)
- [ ] No draft content accidentally set to `draft: false`
- [ ] Previewed locally with `hugo server -D` (if possible)
